name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.6.4 stability hotfix, first-commit unstaging, and splitter PipelineStoppedException prevention
added: Consistent v3.6.4 version metadata, launcher target, smoke-launch target, static smoke markers, and release documentation
ASCII-safe history visual graph lane markers for Windows PowerShell 5.1 source-encoding robustness
Decorated history model rows with branch, remote branch, tag, HEAD, merge, and ref-kind classifications
History / Graph ListView columns for branches, tags, remotes, author, and date
Curated ScriptAnalyzer runner with optional strict/fail-on-warning modes and generated-folder exclusions
Resolved/unresolved conflict-state detection from status, unmerged files, and Git operation markers
Continue operation guidance based on MERGE_HEAD, CHERRY_PICK_HEAD, and rebase markers
External merge tool command configuration and launch action
Improved visual graph selection and command preview coupling
Startup X/close now aborts startup instead of continuing without a repository
Fixed cherry-pick conflict workflow test capture for PowerShell/Pester
next_recommended: Add file-level conflict helper actions and resolved-file verification
Add configurable external diff/merge tool profiles
Start GitHub/GitLab pull request integration planning
highlights: Correct unstaging behavior before the first commit by using git rm --cached when HEAD does not exist
Removed fragile SplitterMoved PowerShell event handler to avoid resize/shutdown PipelineStoppedException dialogs
Added regression tests for no-HEAD unstaging workflows
